_meta.purpose: NHIS Adult/Child Summary Health Statistics chatbot keyword mapping
_meta.scope: NHIS SHS adult/child topics and demographic subgroup labels only; unrelated broader NCHS topics removed
notes: Exact CDC outcome/group/subgroup labels are retained, with common-language synonyms added.
Use population field/preferred_datasets to resolve adult vs child when a topic label appears in both files.
_meta.demographic_mapping_style: demographic_mappings is concept-based for backward compatibility; population_demographic_mappings contains exact adult/child grouping sections.
